questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the path of the first blue ball.
questions.answer: The first blue ball drops from (2,-1), rolls through the ramps at (1,8), (2,7), (3,8), (4,9), (5,10), (6,11), reaching the right lever at (8,11) which releases a red ball.

questions.question: Explain how the solution works - why does releasing a blue ball lead to intercepting a red ball?
questions.answer: The solution uses the blue ball to trigger the right lever, which releases a red ball. The ramps then guide this red ball to the interceptor.
